_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
min_doctor_qualification: MS/ DNB/ PG Diploma or equivalent (in ENT)
clinical_indications: Recurrent episodes of tonsillitis which are disabling and prevent normal functioning and occur with a frequency of either:
7 or more well documented episodes in the preceding year
5 or more episodes in each of the preceding two years
3 or more in each of the three preceding years
Tonsillar hyperplasia (with/ without adenoid hyperplasia) resulting in obstructive sleep apnoea/ speech defects/ craniofacial abnormalities/ dysphagia or failure to thrive/ cor-pulmonale
Interval tonsillectomy for one episode of peritonsillar abscess in the background of recurrent tonsillitis or more than one episode of quinsy on the same side
Recurrent tonsillitis associated with vulvular heart disease or recurrent febrile seizure

clinical_thresholds.note: well documented episodes in the preceding year
well documented episodes in each of the preceding two years
well documented episodes in each of the three preceding years

preauth.label: Clinical notes (detailing signs, symptoms, examination findings, indications for doing the procedure & advise for admission)

claim.label: Post procedure clinical photograph of the affected part

ppd_preauth.q: Detailed Clinical notes (including clinical signs & symptoms such as difficulty in breathing, examination findings of oral cavity and tonsils, indications for doing the procedure & advise for admission)?

cpd_claim.q: Do OT notes detail the steps of surgery performed and outcomes of the surgery?
Are the documents available to show appropriate post-op care, advise including for follow-up?
Is the histopathology report of removed tonsils available in case of tonsillectomy?
Is the picture of gross specimen on removed tonsils available in case of tonsillectomy?
Is the Post procedure clinical photograph of the affected part available?

common_queries: Clinical notes (detailing signs, symptoms, examination findings, indications, and advice for admission) missing or incomplete at pre-authorization
Throat culture report missing at pre-authorization
OT notes do not detail surgical steps or outcomes at claim stage
Histopathology report of removed tonsils missing at claim stage
Picture of gross specimen on removed tonsils missing at claim stage
Post-procedure clinical photograph of the affected part missing at claim stage
Signs, symptoms, or examination findings do not confirm the presence of enlarged tonsils

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed for Surgery only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical signs, symptoms, examination.
surgical_options: surgical removal of faucial tonsils, performed with or without adenoidectomy by dissecting in the peritonsillar space between the tonsil capsule and the pharyngobasillar fascia covering the superior constrictor muscle.
additional_information.post_op_care: soft diet, oral hygiene, oral antibiotics, analgesics and immediate reporting to hospital in case of oral bleeding
